name: P3 Financial Module Implementation Pipeline
description: Multi-stage pipeline for implementing P3 Financial Module initiatives across nammayatri, control-center, and ny-react-native

stages.name: Stage 1: Foundation (Shared Kernel + Backend Specs)
stages.description: Create shared types and YAML specs first, as other stages depend on them

stages.name: Stage 2: Backend Implementation
stages.description: Implement backend APIs and business logic after specs are ready

stages.name: Stage 3: Frontend Implementation
stages.description: Implement control-center and provider app UIs after backend APIs exist
